NAVAREA XIX 100/17
RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 311830 UTC AUG 17.
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
74-04.2N - 035-48.4E SONGA ENABLER
73-26.1N - 024-23.3E ISLAND INNOVATOR
72-43.7N - 020-50.8E LEIV EIRIKSSON
71-19.2N - 022-14.8E FLOATEL ENDURANCE ACP GOLIAT
71-10.2N - 022-12.3E SCARABEO 8
65-22.2N - 007-21.3E SONGA ENCOURAGE

NOTES:
A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METER SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
C. ACP - ADJACENT TO CHARTED PLATFORM 
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 98/17
